hero.title: Privacy Policy
hero.subtitle: Your privacy and data protection are our top priorities

introduction.title: Our Commitment to Privacy
introduction.content: At Shikshanam, we are committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring the security of your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your data when you use our platform and services.

informationCollection.title: Information We Collect
informationCollection.subtitle: We collect information to provide and improve our services

types.title: Personal Information
types.description: Name, email address, phone number, and other contact information you provide

types.title: Account Information
types.description: Information related to your account and learning progress

types.title: Usage Data
types.description: Information about how you interact with our platform

types.title: Payment Information
types.description: Billing and payment details (processed securely by third-party providers)

dataUsage.title: How We Use Your Information
dataUsage.subtitle: We use your data to provide and improve our services

purposes.title: Service Delivery
purposes.description: To provide access to courses, track progress, and deliver educational content

purposes.title: Communication
purposes.description: To send course updates, important announcements, and respond to your inquiries

purposes.title: Service Improvement
purposes.description: To analyze usage patterns and improve our platform and content

purposes.title: Security
purposes.description: To protect against fraud, unauthorized access, and other security threats

dataSharing.title: Information Sharing
dataSharing.subtitle: We do not sell your personal information

sharing.title: Service Providers
sharing.description: We may share information with trusted third-party service providers who help us operate our platform

sharing.title: Legal Requirements
sharing.description: We may disclose information when required by law or to protect our rights and safety

sharing.title: With Your Consent
sharing.description: We may share information with your explicit consent for specific purposes

dataSecurity.title: Data Security
dataSecurity.subtitle: We implement robust security measures to protect your information

measures.title: Encryption
measures.description: All data is encrypted in transit and at rest using industry-standard encryption protocols

measures.title: Access Controls
measures.description: Strict access controls ensure only authorized personnel can access your data

measures.title: Security Monitoring
measures.description: Continuous monitoring and regular security audits to protect against threats

measures.title: Staff Training
measures.description: Regular training for our team on data protection and privacy best practices

yourRights.title: Your Rights
yourRights.subtitle: You have control over your personal information

rights.title: Right to Access
rights.description: You can request a copy of the personal information we hold about you

rights.title: Right to Correction
rights.description: You can request correction of inaccurate or incomplete information

rights.title: Right to Deletion
rights.description: You can request deletion of your personal information in certain circumstances

rights.title: Right to Data Portability
rights.description: You can request your data in a structured, machine-readable format

rights.title: Right to Object
rights.description: You can object to certain types of data processing

cookies.title: Cookies and Tracking
cookies.subtitle: We use cookies to enhance your experience

types.title: Essential Cookies
types.description: Required for basic platform functionality and security

types.title: Analytics Cookies
types.description: Help us understand how users interact with our platform

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Questions about your privacy? We're here to help
contact.message: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or want to exercise your rights, please contact us. We will respond to your inquiry within 30 days.
